title: Add test-service-images CI job with stestr and per-service exclusions
description:
**Size:** 📦 medium
**Category:** infrastructure
**Priority:** high
**Source:** Proposed for 'When the service images are built (build-imag'

Add a `test-service-images` matrix job to `.github/workflows/build-images.yaml` that runs upstream OpenStack unit tests before images are signed/published. The job reuses the existing source-checkout, patch-application, and constraint-override steps from `build-service-images`. It installs the service with test extras (`<service>[test] stestr testtools`) via `uv pip install` in the venv-builder container, then runs `stestr run` with an optional `--exclude-list` flag pointing to `releases/<release>/test-excludes/<service>.txt`. Matrix starts with `{service: [keystone], release: ["2025.2"]}`. Job dependencies: `needs: [build-base-images, verify-base-images]`. Update `verify-service-images` to also require `test-service-images`. Subunit test output uploaded as CI artifacts. Create initial `releases/2025.2/test-excludes/keystone.txt` exclusion file. Update `verify_release_config.sh` to accept the optional `test-excludes/` subdirectory and validate file format. Update `verify_build_images_workflow.sh` to validate the new job structure and dependency wiring.

**Rationale:** Currently there is no validation that upstream OpenStack code combined with patches and constraint overrides produces functional code. A broken patch or incompatible constraint override can ship broken service images. Running upstream unit tests catches regressions before images reach signing and publication, reducing the blast radius of upstream source integration failures.

**Affected Areas:**
- .github/workflows/build-images.yaml
- releases/2025.2/test-excludes/keystone.txt
- tests/container-images/verify_release_config.sh
- tests/container-images/verify_build_images_workflow.sh
elaboration:
---

**Size:** 🔨 medium
**Category:** infrastructure
**Priority:** high

## Summary

Add a `test-service-images` job to `build-images.yaml` that executes upstream OpenStack unit tests for each service using the venv-builder container image. The job runs `stestr` after installing the service and its test dependencies, with per-service test exclusion patterns stored in `releases/<release>/test-excludes/<service>.txt`. This validates that the combination of upstream source + patches + constraint overrides produces functional code before images are signed and published.

## Scope

**Included:**
- New `test-service-images` job in `.github/workflows/build-images.yaml` with `matrix: {service: [keystone], release: ["2025.2"]}`, matching `build-service-images`
- Source checkout, patch application (`git apply`), and constraint override steps (`scripts/apply-constraint-overrides.sh`), reusing existing patterns from `build-service-images` (lines 296–328)
- Installation of service + test dependencies (`stestr`, `testtools`, test extras) via `uv pip install --prefix /var/lib/openstack --constraint` in venv-builder container
- `stestr run` execution with `--exclude-list` pointing to the exclusion file (when present)
- Per-service test exclusion file at `releases/<release>/test-excludes/<service>.txt` (optional, stestr regex format, one pattern per line)
- Test results uploaded as CI artifacts (stestr subunit output)
- Job dependency wiring: `needs: [build-base-images, verify-base-images]` (same as `build-service-images`), with `verify-service-images` requiring both `test-service-images` and `build-service-images` to pass
- Update `tests/container-images/verify_release_config.sh` to accept the optional `test-excludes/` subdirectory
- Update `tests/container-images/verify_build_images_workflow.sh` to validate the new job structure

**Excluded:**
- Changes to Dockerfiles (YAGNI — tests run in CI, not in the image build)
- Test coverage reporting / Codecov integration for upstream OpenStack tests (separate concern)
- Running integration or functional tests from upstream (only unit tests requested)
- Makefile targets for local test execution of upstream tests (not requested)
- Changes to `extra-packages.yaml` schema (exclusions go in a separate file)

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph build_images["build-images.yaml"]
        BASE["build-base-images"]
        VERIFY_BASE["verify-base-images"]
        BASE --> VERIFY_BASE

        TEST["test-service-images"]
        BUILD["build-service-images"]

        VERIFY_BASE --> TEST
        VERIFY_BASE --> BUILD

        VERIFY_SVC["verify-service-images"]
        TEST --> VERIFY_SVC
        BUILD --> VERIFY_SVC
    end

    subgraph test_job["test-service-images job steps"]
        CHECKOUT["Checkout upstream source"]
        PATCH["Apply patches"]
        CONSTRAINTS["Apply constraint overrides"]
        RESOLVE_EXCL["Resolve test-excludes file"]
        INSTALL["uv pip install service + test deps"]
        RUN["stestr run --exclude-list"]
        UPLOAD["Upload subunit artifacts"]

        CHECKOUT --> PATCH --> CONSTRAINTS --> RESOLVE_EXCL --> INSTALL --> RUN --> UPLOAD
    end

    subgraph config["releases/2025.2/"]
        SREFS["source-refs.yaml"]
        UC["upper-constraints.txt"]
        TEXCL["test-excludes/keystone.txt"]
    end

    SREFS --> CHECKOUT
    UC --> INSTALL
    TEXCL -.->|optional| RUN
```

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant CI as GitHub Actions
    participant VB as venv-builder container
    participant SRC as OpenStack source
    participant CFG as releases/2025.2/

    CI->>CFG: Read source-refs.yaml
    CI->>SRC: git checkout + git apply patches
    CI->>CFG: apply-constraint-overrides.sh
    CI->>VB: docker run venv-builder
    VB->>VB: uv pip install --constraint service + test deps
    CI->>CFG: Check test-excludes/keystone.txt
    VB->>VB: stestr run --exclude-list
    VB-->>CI: Test results subunit output
    CI->>CI: Upload artifacts
```

## Key Components

- **`test-service-images` job** (`.github/workflows/build-images.yaml`): New matrix job (`service x release`) running upstream unit tests in the venv-builder image (`needs: [build-base-images, verify-base-images]`), single-arch only (no multi-arch test redundancy)
- **Test exclusion files** (`releases/<release>/test-excludes/<service>.txt`): Optional per-service files containing stestr-compatible regex patterns (one per line) for `--exclude-list`. Follows existing per-release, per-service config pattern alongside `source-refs.yaml` and `extra-packages.yaml`
- **Source preparation steps**: Reuses existing pattern from `build-service-images` — resolve ref from `source-refs.yaml`, checkout upstream, apply `patches/<service>/<release>/*.patch`, run `scripts/apply-constraint-overrides.sh`
- **Test dependency installation**: `uv pip install --prefix /var/lib/openstack --constraint upper-constraints.txt <service>[test] stestr testtools` in venv-builder container
- **Test execution**: `stestr run` with conditional `--exclude-list` flag when `test-excludes/<service>.txt` exists, outputting subunit results for artifact upload
- **Verification script updates**: `verify_release_config.sh` and `verify_build_images_workflow.sh` updated to validate the new `test-excludes/` structure and job dependencies
